member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableBatchAttribute
member.summary: Groups related properties for batched change notifications. Use with SuspendNotifications(batchId) to update multiple properties with a single notification.
member.param: A unique identifier for this batch group.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableBatchAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Groups related properties for batched change notifications. Use with SuspendNotifications(batchId) to update multiple properties with a single notification.
member.param: A unique identifier for this batch group.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableBatchAttribute.BatchId
member.summary: Gets the batch identifier for grouping property notifications.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAttribute
member.summary: Marks a partial property as an observable command that will be automatically implemented by the source generator. Supports sync/async commands with or without parameters.
member.param: The name of the private method that executes when the command is invoked. Use for compile-time safety.
Optional. The name of the private method that determines if the command can execute. Must return . Use for compile-time safety.

remarks.para: The generator automatically detects property usage in methods to set up reactive change notifications.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Marks a partial property as an observable command that will be automatically implemented by the source generator. Supports sync/async commands with or without parameters.
member.param: The name of the private method that executes when the command is invoked. Use for compile-time safety.
Optional. The name of the private method that determines if the command can execute. Must return . Use for compile-time safety.

remarks.para: The generator automatically detects property usage in methods to set up reactive change notifications.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandTriggerAttribute
member.summary: Automatically triggers a command when a specified property changes. Multiple triggers can be applied to the same command property.
member.param: The property that triggers command execution when it changes. Supports dot notation for referenced models (e.g., "SettingsModel.AutoRefresh").
Optional. The name of a private method that determines if the trigger should execute. Must return . Combined with command's canExecute using logical AND.

remarks.para: Warning: Avoid circular triggers where the command modifies the same property it listens to.
See RXBG012 for circular trigger troubleshooting.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandTriggerAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Automatically triggers a command when a specified property changes. Multiple triggers can be applied to the same command property.
member.param: The property that triggers command execution when it changes. Supports dot notation for referenced models (e.g., "SettingsModel.AutoRefresh").
Optional. The name of a private method that determines if the trigger should execute. Must return . Combined with command's canExecute using logical AND.

remarks.para: Warning: Avoid circular triggers where the command modifies the same property it listens to.
See RXBG012 for circular trigger troubleshooting.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandTriggerAttribute`1
member.summary: Automatically triggers a parametrized command when a property changes, passing a predefined parameter value.
member.typeparam: The parameter type. Must match the command's generic type parameter exactly.
member.param: The property that triggers command execution when it changes.
The value to pass to the command when triggered.
Optional. The name of a private method that determines if the trigger should execute.

remarks.para: See RXBG011 for type parameter requirements.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandTriggerAttribute`1.#ctor(System.String,`0,System.String)
member.summary: Automatically triggers a parametrized command when a property changes, passing a predefined parameter value.
member.typeparam: The parameter type. Must match the command's generic type parameter exactly.
member.param: The property that triggers command execution when it changes.
The value to pass to the command when triggered.
Optional. The name of a private method that determines if the trigger should execute.

remarks.para: See RXBG011 for type parameter requirements.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableComponentAttribute
member.summary: Generates a complete Blazor component class that inherits from ObservableComponent<T>. The generated component automatically subscribes to model property changes based on batches and can optionally generate hooks for triggers in referenced ObservableModels.
member.param: Optional. When true (default), generates hook methods for [ObservableComponentTrigger] properties in referenced ObservableModels (via partial constructor parameters). Referenced models must be in the same assembly for this feature to work. Set to false to disable cross-model trigger generation.
Optional. The name of the generated component class. If not specified, defaults to {ModelName}Component.

remarks.para: Usage: Apply to ObservableModel classes to generate corresponding component classes.

list.item: Inherits from ObservableComponent<T> where T is your model
Automatic subscription management via CompositeDisposable
Batched property change notifications based on [ObservableComponentTrigger] attributes
Lifecycle hooks: InitializeGeneratedCode, InitializeGeneratedCodeAsync
Virtual hook methods for local [ObservableComponentTrigger] properties
Virtual hook methods for referenced model triggers (when includeReferencedTriggers=true)

remarks.para: Hook methods for referenced model triggers follow the pattern:
Example: OnWeatherSettingsIsDayChanged where:

list.item: Weather = current model (WeatherModel with "Model" suffix stripped)
Settings = referenced property name (from parameter 'settings')
IsDay = trigger property on referenced model

remarks.para: Referenced models with triggers must be in the same assembly. If a referenced model is in a different assembly, either move it to the same assembly or set includeReferencedTriggers=false.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableComponentAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a complete Blazor component class that inherits from ObservableComponent<T>. The generated component automatically subscribes to model property changes based on batches and can optionally generate hooks for triggers in referenced ObservableModels.
member.param: Optional. When true (default), generates hook methods for [ObservableComponentTrigger] properties in referenced ObservableModels (via partial constructor parameters). Referenced models must be in the same assembly for this feature to work. Set to false to disable cross-model trigger generation.
Optional. The name of the generated component class. If not specified, defaults to {ModelName}Component.

remarks.para: Usage: Apply to ObservableModel classes to generate corresponding component classes.

list.item: Inherits from ObservableComponent<T> where T is your model
Automatic subscription management via CompositeDisposable
Batched property change notifications based on [ObservableComponentTrigger] attributes
Lifecycle hooks: InitializeGeneratedCode, InitializeGeneratedCodeAsync
Virtual hook methods for local [ObservableComponentTrigger] properties
Virtual hook methods for referenced model triggers (when includeReferencedTriggers=true)

remarks.para: Hook methods for referenced model triggers follow the pattern:
Example: OnWeatherSettingsIsDayChanged where:

list.item: Weather = current model (WeatherModel with "Model" suffix stripped)
Settings = referenced property name (from parameter 'settings')
IsDay = trigger property on referenced model

remarks.para: Referenced models with triggers must be in the same assembly. If a referenced model is in a different assembly, either move it to the same assembly or set includeReferencedTriggers=false.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableComponentTriggerAsyncAttribute
member.summary: Generates an async hook method that is called when the property value changes. The hook method receives a CancellationToken parameter. Use on partial properties within ObservableModel classes that have [ObservableComponent] attribute. The attribute only generates hooks — rendering is handled by the reactive pipeline through properties referenced in the razor file.
member.param: Optional custom name for the async hook method. If not specified, defaults to On{PropertyName}ChangedAsync.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableComponentTriggerAsyncAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Generates an async hook method that is called when the property value changes. The hook method receives a CancellationToken parameter. Use on partial properties within ObservableModel classes that have [ObservableComponent] attribute. The attribute only generates hooks — rendering is handled by the reactive pipeline through properties referenced in the razor file.
member.param: Optional custom name for the async hook method. If not specified, defaults to On{PropertyName}ChangedAsync.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableComponentTriggerAttribute
member.summary: Generates a virtual hook method in the component class that is called when the property value changes. Use with [ObservableComponent] attribute to create component-level property change handlers. The attribute only generates hooks — rendering is handled by the reactive pipeline through properties referenced in the razor file. Multiple triggers can be applied to the same property. When applied to properties in models that are referenced by other models (via partial constructor), the hook methods are automatically propagated to the referencing model's component.
member.param: Optional. The name of the hook method to generate. If not specified, defaults to On{PropertyName}Changed. Use for compile-time safety when specifying.

remarks.para: Usage: Apply to partial properties in models decorated with [ObservableComponent].
When a trigger is propagated to a referencing model's component, the hook method name follows:

list.item: Both models must be in the same assembly
Referencing model must have [ObservableComponent(includeReferencedTriggers: true)]
Referenced model must be injected via partial constructor parameter

remarks.para: Warning: Avoid modifying the same property within its hook to prevent update loops.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableComponentTriggerAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Generates a virtual hook method in the component class that is called when the property value changes. Use with [ObservableComponent] attribute to create component-level property change handlers. The attribute only generates hooks — rendering is handled by the reactive pipeline through properties referenced in the razor file. Multiple triggers can be applied to the same property. When applied to properties in models that are referenced by other models (via partial constructor), the hook methods are automatically propagated to the referencing model's component.
member.param: Optional. The name of the hook method to generate. If not specified, defaults to On{PropertyName}Changed. Use for compile-time safety when specifying.

remarks.para: Usage: Apply to partial properties in models decorated with [ObservableComponent].
When a trigger is propagated to a referencing model's component, the hook method name follows:

list.item: Both models must be in the same assembly
Referencing model must have [ObservableComponent(includeReferencedTriggers: true)]
Referenced model must be injected via partial constructor parameter

remarks.para: Warning: Avoid modifying the same property within its hook to prevent update loops.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModelObserverAttribute
member.summary: Marks a method in a service class as an observer for property changes on an ObservableModel. When the service is injected into the model via a partial constructor, the generator automatically subscribes this method to changes of the specified property.

remarks.para: The method must follow one of these signature patterns:

item.description: Async without cancellation: Task MethodName(ModelType model)
Async with cancellation: Task MethodName(ModelType model, CancellationToken ct)

remarks.para: Multiple observers can be attached to the same property by applying the attribute multiple times to different methods. Each observer gets its own subscription.

member.param: The name of the property to observe. Use nameof(ModelType.PropertyName) for type safety.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModelObserverAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Marks a method in a service class as an observer for property changes on an ObservableModel. When the service is injected into the model via a partial constructor, the generator automatically subscribes this method to changes of the specified property.

remarks.para: The method must follow one of these signature patterns:

item.description: Async without cancellation: Task MethodName(ModelType model)
Async with cancellation: Task MethodName(ModelType model, CancellationToken ct)

remarks.para: Multiple observers can be attached to the same property by applying the attribute multiple times to different methods. Each observer gets its own subscription.

member.param: The name of the property to observe. Use nameof(ModelType.PropertyName) for type safety.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ModelScope
member.summary: Defines the dependency injection lifetime scope for ObservableModel instances. Determines how the model is registered in the DI container and how instances are shared.

remarks.para: Important considerations:

item.description: Required when multiple ObservableComponent<T> instances use the same model. Ensures data consistency across components.
Good for models that should live for the duration of a request/page but can have multiple instances in different scopes.
Creates a new instance every time the model is requested. Use sparingly as it can break reactive bindings.

remarks.para: The analyzer will report diagnostic RXBG010 if multiple components use the same model with non-Singleton scope.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.Model.ModelScope.Singleton
member.summary: Single instance shared across the entire application lifetime. Required when multiple ObservableComponent<T> instances use the same model.
member.remarks:
Use for:
Global application state
User session data
Settings and configuration
Any model used by multiple components

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.Model.ModelScope.Scoped
member.summary: Single instance per scope (typically per HTTP request in server scenarios, or per component tree in client scenarios). Can only be used when the model is consumed by a single component. This is the default scope when no attribute is specified.
member.remarks:
Use for:
Page-specific data that shouldn't be shared across pages
Form models that should reset between uses
Models that hold temporary state

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.Model.ModelScope.Transient
member.summary: New instance created every time the model is requested. Use with extreme caution as it can break reactive bindings and component communication. Can only be used when the model is consumed by a single component.
member.remarks:
Use for:
Lightweight data transfer objects
Models that need to be completely isolated
Testing scenarios
Generally avoid this scope unless you have a specific need for complete isolation.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModelScopeAttribute
member.summary: Specifies the dependency injection lifetime scope for an ObservableModel class. Defaults to Scoped if not specified.
member.param: The lifetime scope for this model (Singleton, Scoped, or Transient).

remarks.para: Important: Models used by multiple components must use Singleton scope.
See RXBG010 for scope requirements and troubleshooting.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModelScopeAttribute.#ctor(RxBlazorV2.Model.ModelScope)
member.summary: Specifies the dependency injection lifetime scope for an ObservableModel class. Defaults to Scoped if not specified.
member.param: The lifetime scope for this model (Singleton, Scoped, or Transient).

remarks.para: Important: Models used by multiple components must use Singleton scope.
See RXBG010 for scope requirements and troubleshooting.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModelScopeAttribute.Scope
member.summary: Gets the dependency injection lifetime scope for this ObservableModel.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableTriggerAsyncAttribute
member.summary: Automatically executes an async method when the decorated property changes. This is a shortcut alternative to creating explicit async command properties with triggers. Multiple triggers can be applied to the same property.
member.param: The name of the private async method to execute when the property changes. Method must return Task or ValueTask and may optionally accept a CancellationToken parameter. Use for compile-time safety.
Optional. The name of a private method that determines if the trigger should execute. Must return .

remarks.para: Usage: Apply to partial properties to automatically execute async methods on property changes.

list.item: Task Method() - Basic async execution
Task Method(CancellationToken ct) - With cancellation support
ValueTask Method() - High-performance async
ValueTask Method(CancellationToken ct) - High-performance with cancellation

remarks.para: Warning: Avoid circular triggers where the method modifies the same property it listens to.

list.item: - For sync method triggers
- For parametrized async triggers
- For external service subscriptions

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableTriggerAsyncAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Automatically executes an async method when the decorated property changes. This is a shortcut alternative to creating explicit async command properties with triggers. Multiple triggers can be applied to the same property.
member.param: The name of the private async method to execute when the property changes. Method must return Task or ValueTask and may optionally accept a CancellationToken parameter. Use for compile-time safety.
Optional. The name of a private method that determines if the trigger should execute. Must return .

remarks.para: Usage: Apply to partial properties to automatically execute async methods on property changes.

list.item: Task Method() - Basic async execution
Task Method(CancellationToken ct) - With cancellation support
ValueTask Method() - High-performance async
ValueTask Method(CancellationToken ct) - High-performance with cancellation

remarks.para: Warning: Avoid circular triggers where the method modifies the same property it listens to.

list.item: - For sync method triggers
- For parametrized async triggers
- For external service subscriptions

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableTriggerAsyncAttribute`1
member.summary: Automatically executes a parametrized async method when the decorated property changes. This is a shortcut alternative to creating explicit parametrized async command properties with triggers.
member.typeparam: The parameter type passed to the async execution method.
member.param: The name of the private async method to execute when the property changes. The method must accept a parameter of type T and return Task or ValueTask. May optionally accept a second CancellationToken parameter. Use for compile-time safety.
The value to pass to the async execution method when triggered.
Optional. The name of a private method that determines if the trigger should execute. Must return .

remarks.para: Usage: Apply to partial properties to automatically execute parametrized async methods on property changes.

list.item: Task Method(T parameter) - Basic async execution with parameter
Task Method(T parameter, CancellationToken ct) - With cancellation support
ValueTask Method(T parameter) - High-performance async
ValueTask Method(T parameter, CancellationToken ct) - High-performance with cancellation

remarks.para: Warning: Avoid circular triggers where the method modifies the same property it listens to.

list.item: - For sync parametrized triggers
- For non-parametrized async triggers
- For external service subscriptions

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableTriggerAsyncAttribute`1.#ctor(System.String,`0,System.String)
member.summary: Automatically executes a parametrized async method when the decorated property changes. This is a shortcut alternative to creating explicit parametrized async command properties with triggers.
member.typeparam: The parameter type passed to the async execution method.
member.param: The name of the private async method to execute when the property changes. The method must accept a parameter of type T and return Task or ValueTask. May optionally accept a second CancellationToken parameter. Use for compile-time safety.
The value to pass to the async execution method when triggered.
Optional. The name of a private method that determines if the trigger should execute. Must return .

remarks.para: Usage: Apply to partial properties to automatically execute parametrized async methods on property changes.

list.item: Task Method(T parameter) - Basic async execution with parameter
Task Method(T parameter, CancellationToken ct) - With cancellation support
ValueTask Method(T parameter) - High-performance async
ValueTask Method(T parameter, CancellationToken ct) - High-performance with cancellation

remarks.para: Warning: Avoid circular triggers where the method modifies the same property it listens to.

list.item: - For sync parametrized triggers
- For non-parametrized async triggers
- For external service subscriptions

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableTriggerAttribute
member.summary: Automatically executes a method when the decorated property changes. This is a shortcut alternative to creating explicit command properties with triggers. Multiple triggers can be applied to the same property.
member.param: The name of the private method to execute when the property changes. Supports sync/async methods with or without parameters. Use for compile-time safety.
Optional. The name of a private method that determines if the trigger should execute. Must return .

remarks.para: Usage: Apply to partial properties to automatically execute methods on property changes.
Warning: Avoid circular triggers where the method modifies the same property it listens to.
See RXBG012 for circular trigger troubleshooting.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableTriggerAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Automatically executes a method when the decorated property changes. This is a shortcut alternative to creating explicit command properties with triggers. Multiple triggers can be applied to the same property.
member.param: The name of the private method to execute when the property changes. Supports sync/async methods with or without parameters. Use for compile-time safety.
Optional. The name of a private method that determines if the trigger should execute. Must return .

remarks.para: Usage: Apply to partial properties to automatically execute methods on property changes.
Warning: Avoid circular triggers where the method modifies the same property it listens to.
See RXBG012 for circular trigger troubleshooting.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableTriggerAttribute`1
member.summary: Automatically executes a parametrized method when the decorated property changes. This is a shortcut alternative to creating explicit parametrized command properties with triggers.
member.typeparam: The parameter type passed to the execution method.
member.param: The name of the private method to execute when the property changes. The method must accept a parameter of type T. Use for compile-time safety.
The value to pass to the execution method when triggered.
Optional. The name of a private method that determines if the trigger should execute. Must return .

remarks.para: Usage: Apply to partial properties to automatically execute parametrized methods on property changes.
Warning: Avoid circular triggers where the method modifies the same property it listens to.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableTriggerAttribute`1.#ctor(System.String,`0,System.String)
member.summary: Automatically executes a parametrized method when the decorated property changes. This is a shortcut alternative to creating explicit parametrized command properties with triggers.
member.typeparam: The parameter type passed to the execution method.
member.param: The name of the private method to execute when the property changes. The method must accept a parameter of type T. Use for compile-time safety.
The value to pass to the execution method when triggered.
Optional. The name of a private method that determines if the trigger should execute. Must return .

remarks.para: Usage: Apply to partial properties to automatically execute parametrized methods on property changes.
Warning: Avoid circular triggers where the method modifies the same property it listens to.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandBase
member.summary: Base class for all observable command implementations, extending with property change filtering.
member.param: The owning whose property changes are observed.
Property names that trigger re-evaluation of this command.
Display name of the command, used for error reporting.
Name of the backing method, used for error reporting.
Optional to delegate error handling to.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandBase.#ctor(RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel,System.String[],System.String,System.String,RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel)
member.summary: Base class for all observable command implementations, extending with property change filtering.
member.param: The owning whose property changes are observed.
Property names that trigger re-evaluation of this command.
Display name of the command, used for error reporting.
Name of the backing method, used for error reporting.
Optional to delegate error handling to.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandBase.CanExecute
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the command can currently execute. Returns true by default.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandBase.Error
member.summary: Gets the most recent exception thrown during command execution, or null if no error occurred.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandBase.ResetError
member.summary: Clears the current .

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandBase.SetError(System.Exception)
member.summary: Sets or clears the current error. When a is configured, delegates the error to it instead.
member.param: The exception to record, or null to clear the error.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandBase.SubscribeCore(R3.Observer{System.String[]})
member.summary: Subscribes the observer to the owning model's property change notifications, filtered to the observed properties.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommand
member.summary: Abstract base class for synchronous observable commands.
member.param: The owning whose property changes are observed.
Property names that trigger re-evaluation of this command.
Display name of the command, used for error reporting.
Name of the backing method, used for error reporting.
Optional to delegate error handling to.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommand.#ctor(RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel,System.String[],System.String,System.String,RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel)
member.summary: Abstract base class for synchronous observable commands.
member.param: The owning whose property changes are observed.
Property names that trigger re-evaluation of this command.
Display name of the command, used for error reporting.
Name of the backing method, used for error reporting.
Optional to delegate error handling to.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommand.Execute
member.summary: Executes the command synchronously.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandFactory
member.summary: Concrete synchronous command implementation that invokes an delegate.
member.param: The owning whose property changes are observed.
Property names that trigger re-evaluation and are notified after execution.
Display name of the command, used for error reporting.
Name of the backing method, used for error reporting.
The delegate to invoke when the command executes.
Optional guard function that determines whether the command can execute.
Optional to delegate error handling to.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandFactory.#ctor(RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel,System.String[],System.String,System.String,System.Action,System.Func{System.Boolean},RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel)
member.summary: Concrete synchronous command implementation that invokes an delegate.
member.param: The owning whose property changes are observed.
Property names that trigger re-evaluation and are notified after execution.
Display name of the command, used for error reporting.
Name of the backing method, used for error reporting.
The delegate to invoke when the command executes.
Optional guard function that determines whether the command can execute.
Optional to delegate error handling to.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandFactory.Execute
member.summary: Executes the command by invoking the backing delegate and notifying observed properties.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandFactory.CanExecute
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the command can currently execute, as determined by the guard function.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommand`1
member.summary: Abstract base class for synchronous parametrized observable commands.
member.typeparam: The type of the command parameter.
member.param: The owning whose property changes are observed.
Property names that trigger re-evaluation of this command.
Display name of the command, used for error reporting.
Name of the backing method, used for error reporting.
Optional to delegate error handling to.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommand`1.#ctor(RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel,System.String[],System.String,System.String,RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel)
member.summary: Abstract base class for synchronous parametrized observable commands.
member.typeparam: The type of the command parameter.
member.param: The owning whose property changes are observed.
Property names that trigger re-evaluation of this command.
Display name of the command, used for error reporting.
Name of the backing method, used for error reporting.
Optional to delegate error handling to.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommand`1.Execute(`0)
member.summary: Executes the command synchronously with the given parameter.
member.param: The parameter to pass to the command.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandFactory`1
member.summary: Concrete synchronous parametrized command implementation that invokes an delegate.
member.typeparam: The type of the command parameter.
member.param: The owning whose property changes are observed.
Property names that trigger re-evaluation and are notified after execution.
Display name of the command, used for error reporting.
Name of the backing method, used for error reporting.
The delegate to invoke when the command executes.
Optional guard function that determines whether the command can execute.
Optional to delegate error handling to.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandFactory`1.#ctor(RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel,System.String[],System.String,System.String,System.Action{`0},System.Func{System.Boolean},RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel)
member.summary: Concrete synchronous parametrized command implementation that invokes an delegate.
member.typeparam: The type of the command parameter.
member.param: The owning whose property changes are observed.
Property names that trigger re-evaluation and are notified after execution.
Display name of the command, used for error reporting.
Name of the backing method, used for error reporting.
The delegate to invoke when the command executes.
Optional guard function that determines whether the command can execute.
Optional to delegate error handling to.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandFactory`1.Execute(`0)
member.summary: Executes the command by invoking the backing delegate with the given parameter and notifying observed properties.
member.param: The parameter to pass to the command.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandFactory`1.CanExecute
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the command can currently execute, as determined by the guard function.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsyncBase
member.summary: Base class for async commands with execution tracking and cancellation support.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsyncBase.#ctor(RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel,System.String[],System.String,System.String,RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel)
member.summary: Base class for async commands with execution tracking and cancellation support.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsyncBase.Executing
member.summary: Indicates whether the command is currently executing.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsyncBase.LastCancellationReason
member.summary: Reason for the last cancellation.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsyncBase.CancellationToken
member.summary: Gets the current cancellation token for the executing command.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsyncBase.ResetCancellationToken(System.Nullable{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Resets the cancellation token, optionally linking to an external token.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsyncBase.Cancel
member.summary: Cancels the currently executing command.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsync
member.summary: Abstract async command without parameters.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsync.#ctor(RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel,System.String[],System.String,System.String,RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel)
member.summary: Abstract async command without parameters.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsync.ExecuteAsync(System.Nullable{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Executes the command asynchronously with an optional external cancellation token.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsync.ExecuteAsync
member.summary: Executes the command asynchronously.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsyncFactory
member.summary: Non-cancellable async command that executes a delegate without cancellation support.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsyncFactory.#ctor(RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel,System.String[],System.String,System.String,System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Func{System.Boolean},RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel)
member.summary: Non-cancellable async command that executes a delegate without cancellation support.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsyncCancelableFactory
member.summary: Cancellable async command that supports CancellationToken and switch-cancellation.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsyncCancelableFactory.#ctor(RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel,System.String[],System.String,System.String,System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Func{System.Boolean},RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel)
member.summary: Cancellable async command that supports CancellationToken and switch-cancellation.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsync`1
member.summary: Abstract parametrized async command that accepts a parameter of type .

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsync`1.#ctor(RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel,System.String[],System.String,System.String,RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel)
member.summary: Abstract parametrized async command that accepts a parameter of type .

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsync`1.ExecuteAsync(`0,System.Nullable{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Executes the command asynchronously with the given parameter and optional external cancellation token.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsync`1.ExecuteAsync(`0)
member.summary: Executes the command asynchronously with the given parameter.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsyncFactory`1
member.summary: Non-cancellable parametrized async command that executes a delegate with a parameter.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsyncCancelableFactory`1
member.summary: Cancellable parametrized async command that supports CancellationToken and switch-cancellation.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandAsyncCancelableFactory`1.#ctor(RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel,System.String[],System.String,System.String,System.Func{`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Func{System.Boolean},RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel)
member.summary: Cancellable parametrized async command that supports CancellationToken and switch-cancellation.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel
member.summary: Abstract base class for all reactive models, providing observable state management using R3.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.ModelID
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier for this model, used in property change notifications.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.FilterUsedProperties(System.String[])
member.summary: Returns true if any of the specified property names are used by this model's subscribers.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.Observable
member.summary: Gets the observable stream of property change notifications, emitting arrays of changed property names.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.Subscriptions
member.summary: Gets the composite disposable that manages all reactive subscriptions for this model.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.Initialized
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether both sync and async context initialization have completed.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.PropertyChangedSubject
member.summary: Gets the subject used to publish property change notifications.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the observable stream and subscription container.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.ContextReady
member.summary: Performs synchronous initialization, ensuring it runs only once.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.ContextReadyAsync
member.summary: Performs asynchronous initialization with thread-safe locking, ensuring it runs only once.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.OnContextReadyIntern
member.summary: Called during synchronous initialization for generated code setup; override in generated code only.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.OnContextReady
member.summary: Called during synchronous initialization; override to perform custom setup logic.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.OnContextReadyInternAsync
member.summary: Called during asynchronous initialization for generated code setup; override in generated code only.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.OnContextReadyAsync
member.summary: Called during asynchronous initialization; override to perform custom async setup logic.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.StateHasChanged(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Notifies subscribers that a single property has changed.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.StateHasChanged(System.String[],System.String[])
member.summary: Notifies subscribers that one or more properties have changed, respecting active suspensions.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.SuspendNotifications(System.String[])
member.summary: Suspends state change notifications until the returned IDisposable is disposed. Useful for batch updates to properties or observable collections. All property changes during suspension are batched and fired as a single notification when disposed.
member.param: Optional batch identifiers. When provided, only suspends notifications for properties with matching . When empty, suspends all notifications. Multiple batch IDs can be specified to suspend multiple batch groups simultaneously.

remarks.para: Nested suspensions are not supported and will throw .
Properties without batch IDs are suspended when no batch IDs are specified.
Properties with batch IDs are only suspended if at least one of their batch IDs matches a suspended batch.

member.returns: IDisposable that fires batched notifications when disposed.
member.exception: Thrown when a suspension is already active.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.IsFirstCommandInSuspension
member.summary: Returns true if this is the first command execution within the current suspension scope.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.AbortCurrentSuspension
member.summary: Marks the current notification suspension as aborted, preventing batched notifications on dispose.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.IsSuspensionAborted
member.summary: Returns true if the current notification suspension has been aborted.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.NotificationSuspender
member.summary: Manages a notification suspension scope, batching property changes until disposed.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes subscriptions and the property changed subject.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases managed resources when disposing is true.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandR`1
member.summary: Abstract base class for synchronous observable commands that return a value of type .
member.typeparam: The return type of the command.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandR`1.#ctor(RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel,System.String[],System.String,System.String,RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel)
member.summary: Abstract base class for synchronous observable commands that return a value of type .
member.typeparam: The return type of the command.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandR`1.Execute
member.summary: Executes the command and returns the result.
member.returns: The result of the command execution, or default if execution fails.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandRFactory`1
member.summary: Concrete synchronous observable command that returns a value of type , backed by a delegate.
member.typeparam: The return type of the command.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandRFactory`1.#ctor(RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel,System.String[],System.String,System.String,System.Func{`0},System.Func{System.Boolean},RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel)
member.summary: Concrete synchronous observable command that returns a value of type , backed by a delegate.
member.typeparam: The return type of the command.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandR`2
member.summary: Abstract base class for synchronous observable commands that accept a parameter of type and return a value of type .
member.typeparam: The parameter type of the command.
The return type of the command.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandR`2.#ctor(RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableModel,System.String[],System.String,System.String,RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel)
member.summary: Abstract base class for synchronous observable commands that accept a parameter of type and return a value of type .
member.typeparam: The parameter type of the command.
The return type of the command.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandR`2.Execute(`0)
member.summary: Executes the command with the specified parameter and returns the result.
member.param: The input parameter for the command.
member.returns: The result of the command execution, or default if execution fails.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.ObservableCommandRFactory`2
member.summary: Concrete synchronous observable command that accepts a parameter of type and returns a value of type , backed by a delegate.
member.typeparam: The parameter type of the command.
The return type of the command.

member.summary: Abstract base class for asynchronous observable commands that return a value of type .

member.summary: Executes the command asynchronously with an optional external cancellation token and returns the result.

member.summary: Executes the command asynchronously and returns the result.

member.summary: Non-cancellable asynchronous observable command that returns a value of type , backed by a delegate.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusSeverity
member.summary: Status message severity levels.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusSeverity.Info
member.summary: Informational message.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusSeverity.Success
member.summary: Success message.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusSeverity.Warning
member.summary: Warning message.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusSeverity.Error
member.summary: Error message.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusMessageMode
member.summary:
Specifies how messages are accumulated.
Valid combinations with StatusDisplayMode:
Single: Works with all display modes (SNACKBAR, ICON, SNACKBAR_AND_ICON)
Aggregate: Requires ICON or SNACKBAR_AND_ICON display mode. SNACKBAR alone is auto-upgraded.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusMessageMode.Aggregate
member.summary: Multiple messages can accumulate in the list. Requires ICON or SNACKBAR_AND_ICON display mode for proper aggregated display. Using SNACKBAR alone with Aggregate mode automatically upgrades to SNACKBAR_AND_ICON.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusMessageMode.Single
member.summary: Only one message at a time - new message clears previous. Works with all display modes (SNACKBAR, ICON, SNACKBAR_AND_ICON).

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusMessage
member.summary: Represents a status message with severity level and source context.
member.param: The status message text.
The severity level of the message.
The source of the message (e.g., "RefreshCommand.RefreshDataAsync").

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusMessage.#ctor(System.String,RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusSeverity,System.String)
member.summary: Represents a status message with severity level and source context.
member.param: The status message text.
The severity level of the message.
The source of the message (e.g., "RefreshCommand.RefreshDataAsync").

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusMessage.Message
member.summary: The status message text.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusMessage.Severity
member.summary: The severity level of the message.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusMessage.Source
member.summary: The source of the message (e.g., "RefreshCommand.RefreshDataAsync").

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusMessage.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the message.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusMessage.Timestamp
member.summary: When the message was created.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel
member.summary:
Abstract base class for status management models. Provides unified error and message handling with severity levels and source tracking.
Derive from this class and add [ObservableComponent] and [ObservableModelScope] attributes to create a concrete singleton status model for your application.
Example:
[ObservableComponent] [ObservableModelScope(ModelScope.Singleton)] public partial class AppStatusModel : StatusBaseModel { }

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.Messages
member.summary: All status messages including errors, warnings, info, and success messages. Changes to this collection trigger component updates via [ObservableComponentTrigger].

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.ErrorMessageMode
member.summary: How error messages are accumulated - Aggregate (multiple) or Single (replace).

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.MessageMessageMode
member.summary: How non-error messages (Info, Success, Warning) are accumulated - Aggregate (multiple) or Single (replace).

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.HandleError(System.Exception,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Called by command factories when a command throws an exception. Automatically captures command name and method name as source.
member.param: The exception that was thrown.
The name of the command property (e.g., "RefreshCommand").
The name of the execute method (e.g., "RefreshDataAsync").

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.AddInfo(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an info message.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.AddSuccess(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a success message.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.AddWarning(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a warning message.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.AddError(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an error message.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.AddError(System.Exception,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an error message.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.AddMessage(System.String,RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusSeverity,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a message with the specified severity.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.ClearNonErrorMessages
member.summary: Clears all non-error messages (Info, Success, Warning).

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.ClearErrorMessages
member.summary: Clears all error messages (Error).

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.ClearMessages
member.summary: Clears all messages.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.ClearMessages(RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusSeverity)
member.summary: Clears messages with the specified severity.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.HasErrors
member.summary: Indicates whether there are any error messages.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.HasWarnings
member.summary: Indicates whether there are any warning messages.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.ErrorCount
member.summary: Count of error messages.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.WarningCount
member.summary: Count of warning messages.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.LastError
member.summary: The most recent error message, if any.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Model.StatusBaseModel.LastMessage
member.summary: The most recent message of any severity.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Component.ObservableComponent`1
member.summary: Abstract base Blazor component that binds to a reactive model and manages its lifecycle.
member.typeparam: The observable model type this component is bound to.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Component.ObservableComponent`1.Subscriptions
member.summary: Gets the composite disposable that manages all reactive subscriptions for this component.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Component.ObservableComponent`1.Model
member.summary: Gets the reactive model instance resolved from dependency injection.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Component.ObservableComponent`1.Body
member.summary: Gets or sets the content to be rendered inside the component.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Component.ObservableComponent`1.OnAfterRender(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes generated code and model context on first render.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Component.ObservableComponent`1.OnAfterRenderAsync(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Performs async initialization of generated code and model context on first render.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Component.ObservableComponent`1.InitializeGeneratedCode
member.summary: Called on first render to set up generated subscriptions and triggers; override in generated code only.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Component.ObservableComponent`1.InitializeGeneratedCodeAsync
member.summary: Called on first render for async generated setup; override in generated code only.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Component.ObservableComponent`1.Filter
member.summary: Returns property names this component subscribes to for selective re-rendering.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Component.ObservableComponent`1.OnContextReady
member.summary: Called after first render; override to perform custom synchronous initialization.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Component.ObservableComponent`1.OnContextReadyAsync
member.summary: Called after first render; override to perform custom asynchronous initialization.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Component.ObservableComponent`1.OnDispose
member.summary: Called during disposal; override to perform custom synchronous cleanup.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Component.ObservableComponent`1.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes component subscriptions and invokes custom cleanup via OnDispose.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Component.ObservableComponent`1.OnDisposeAsync
member.summary: Called during async disposal; override to perform custom asynchronous cleanup.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Component.ObservableComponent`1.DisposeAsyncCore
member.summary: Performs async disposal by invoking OnDisposeAsync and the base implementation.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Interface.CancellationReason
member.summary: Reason for command cancellation.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.Interface.CancellationReason.NONE
member.summary: No cancellation occurred.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.Interface.CancellationReason.EXPLICIT
member.summary: Cancelled explicitly via Cancel() method.

member.name: F:RxBlazorV2.Interface.CancellationReason.SWITCH
member.summary: Cancelled implicitly by Switch operation (new trigger fired).

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandBase
member.summary: Base interface for all observable commands providing execution guard and error tracking.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandBase.CanExecute
member.summary: Gets whether the command can currently execute.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandBase.Error
member.summary: Gets the last exception thrown during command execution, or null if none.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandBase.ResetError
member.summary: Clears the current error state.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandAsyncBase
member.summary: Base interface for async observable commands with execution tracking and cancellation support.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandAsyncBase.Executing
member.summary: Gets whether the command is currently executing.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandAsyncBase.LastCancellationReason
member.summary: Reason for the last cancellation. Reset to NONE when command starts.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandAsyncBase.Cancel
member.summary: Cancels the currently executing command.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommand
member.summary: Synchronous observable command without parameters.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommand.Execute
member.summary: Executes the command.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommand`1
member.summary: Synchronous observable command accepting a parameter of type .

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommand`1.Execute(`0)
member.summary: Executes the command with the specified parameter.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandR`1
member.summary: Synchronous observable command returning a result of type .

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandR`1.Execute
member.summary: Executes the command and returns the result.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandR`2
member.summary: Synchronous observable command accepting a parameter of type and returning a result of type .

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandR`2.Execute(`0)
member.summary: Executes the command with the specified parameter and returns the result.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandAsync
member.summary: Asynchronous observable command without parameters.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandAsync.ExecuteAsync
member.summary: Executes the command asynchronously.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandAsync`1
member.summary: Asynchronous observable command accepting a parameter of type .

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandAsync`1.ExecuteAsync(`0)
member.summary: Executes the command asynchronously with the specified parameter.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandRAsync`1
member.summary: Asynchronous observable command returning a result of type .

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandRAsync`1.ExecuteAsync
member.summary: Executes the command asynchronously and returns the result.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandRAsync`2
member.summary: Asynchronous observable command accepting a parameter of type and returning a result of type .

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableCommandRAsync`2.ExecuteAsync(`0)
member.summary: Executes the command asynchronously with the specified parameter and returns the result.

member.name: T:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableModel
member.summary: Defines the contract for reactive model objects in the RxBlazorV2 framework.

remarks.para: Observable models provide automatic property change notifications using R3 observables. They are typically created by the source generator from partial classes that inherit from ObservableModel.

Key features:
Reactive property change notifications via
Automatic subscription cleanup via
Lifecycle management with and
Support for cross-model reactive subscriptions

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableModel.ModelID
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier for this model instance. Used for distinguishing between different model types in the reactive system.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableModel.Observable
member.summary: Gets the observable stream that emits property change notifications. Emits arrays of property names that have changed.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableModel.ContextReady
member.summary: Initializes the model when the context is ready. Called once during the model's lifetime for synchronous initialization.

member.name: M:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableModel.ContextReadyAsync
member.summary: Initializes the model when the context is ready (async version). Called once during the model's lifetime for asynchronous initialization.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous initialization operation.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableModel.Subscriptions
member.summary: Gets the collection of subscriptions managed by this model. All reactive subscriptions should be added to this collection for automatic cleanup on disposal.

member.name: P:RxBlazorV2.Interface.IObservableModel.Initialized
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the model has been initialized. Returns after or has been called.
